title: Atomic Mail offers email inboxes built specifically for AI agents
friendlyTitle: Atomic Mail gives AI agents their own email inboxes
summary: Atomic Mail is offering an open-alpha email service for AI agents, with inbox creation, send/receive workflows, JMAP and REST APIs, MCP support, and an AgentSkill package. The product also uses proof-of-work and reputation mechanisms intended to reduce agent-driven spam abuse.
friendlySummary: Atomic Mail lets AI agents create and use real email inboxes. It supports tools like MCP and includes anti-spam ideas such as proof-of-work and reputation.
whyItMatters: Email remains one of the main pipes of work, but agents usually borrow human inboxes awkwardly. Agent-native inboxes could make automations cleaner, easier to audit, and safer to separate from personal or team mail.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This can make email automation cleaner. Instead of giving an AI access to your personal inbox, it can use its own controlled inbox.
